package rulefixtures

// scenario for append_then_trim_each_iteration: Slice append followed by reslice each iteration instead of batching.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule342NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario342Negative(records []Rule342NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
